series_metadata.series_description: To document and record all Criminal Polygraphs Examinations conducted for OSHP and Outside Law Enforcement Agencies. (HP-24G, Audio/Video, Associated Reports, Graphs, Notes, etc.)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Audio/Video CD media in OSHP Central Records one hundred (100) years. ; Paper: hard copies in OSHP Central Records one hundred (100) years
